nasb.text: Neither in the temple, nor in the synagogues, nor in the city itself did they find me carrying on a discussion with anyone or causing a riot.

esv.text: and they did not find me disputing with anyone or stirring up a crowd, either in the temple or in the synagogues or in the city.

cnv.text: 無論在殿裡、會堂中或城裡，他們都沒有看見我跟人辯論，或煽動群眾作亂，

ccb.text: 这些人根本没有见过我在圣殿、会堂或城里与人争辩，聚众闹事。

csbs.text: 无论在圣殿里，或在会堂里，或在城里，他们都没有看见我和任何人争论，或煽动民众。
